title: SimpleDeathSwap
body:
## Commands:
- /cpanel
- /settings

## Setup
### 1.
First, choose how long it takes between each **swapping** by running running the command **/settings** and clicking on the **clock** item.

### 2.
To start the game, click on the **Lime Concrete** block in the **cpanel** menu. Run the **/cpanel** command or click on the **door** to get to the menu
